channel.title: GitHub Svelte Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Svelte in GitHub

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly WebUI for LLMs (Formerly Ollama WebUI)

item.title: CriticalMoments/CMSaasStarter
item.description: A modern SaaS template/boilerplate built with SvelteKit, Tailwind, and Supabase. Includes marketing page, blog, subscriptions, auth, user dashboard, user settings, pricing page, and more.

item.title: saadeghi/daisyui
item.description: 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼 🌼  The most popular, free and open-source Tailwind CSS component library

item.title: huntabyte/shadcn-svelte
item.description: shadcn/ui, but for Svelte. ✨

item.title: KUN1007/kun-galgame-stickers-sveltekit
item.description: KUN's Visual Novel (galgame) sticker set. To recommend games to more people. Galgame 表情包仓库

item.title: goniszewski/grimoire
item.description: Bookmark manager for the wizards 🧙

item.title: ReVanced/revanced-website
item.description: 🌐 Website for ReVanced

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte-admin-dashboard
item.description: Free and open-source admin dashboard template built with Flowbite, Svelte, and Tailwind CSS

item.title: svecosystem/paneforge
item.description: Resizable pane components for Svelte.

item.title: windmill-labs/windmill
item.description: Open-source developer platform to turn scripts into workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (5x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Airplane and Retool.

item.title: gurucomputing/headscale-ui
item.description: A web frontend for the headscale Tailscale-compatible coordination server

item.title: fireship-io/fireship.io
item.description: Build and ship your app faster https://fireship.io

item.title: pluja/whishper
item.description: Transcribe any audio to text, translate and edit subtitles 100% locally with a web UI. Powered by whisper models!

item.title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui-lite
item.description: Ollama WebUI Stripped 🦙

item.title: GoodiesHQ/headscale-admin
item.description: Admin Web Interface for juanfont/headscale

item.title: aleksilassila/reiverr
item.description: Reiverr is a clean combined interface for Jellyfin, TMDB, Radarr and Sonarr, as well as a replacement to Overseerr

item.title: JacobLinCool/d1-manager
item.description: D1 Manager is a web UI and API for Cloudflare D1, a serverless SQL database. It provides a web interface for managing databases, tables, and records, as well as an AI assistant to help you write query in natural language.

item.title: huntabyte/cmdk-sv
item.description: cmdk, but for Svelte ✨

item.title: codicocodes/dotfyle
item.description: Find the best Neovim plugins

item.title: creativetimofficial/notus-svelte
item.description: Notus Svelte: Free Tailwind CSS UI Kit and Admin

item.title: itswadesh/svelte-commerce
item.description: The open-source storefront for any eCommerce. Built with a PWA and headless approach, using a modern JS stack. The API approach also allows you to merge Svelte Commerce with any third-party tool like payment gateways, POS or AI. WIP for MedusaJS, Woocommerce, Bigcommerce and Shopify.

item.title: Ladvace/astro-bento-portfolio
item.description: Astro-bento-portfolio is a minimal bento-like (almost) single page portfolio website made in Astro

item.title: svecosystem/mode-watcher
item.description: Simple light/dark mode management for SvelteKit apps. 🌑 ←→ ☀️

item.title: themesberg/flowbite-svelte
item.description: Official Svelte components built for Flowbite and Tailwind CSS
